claims.claimText: Syndesmotic Sprain pathoanatomy centers on syndesmosis, talus, deltoid-ligament and related stabilizers.

metadata.claim_text: Syndesmotic Sprain pathoanatomy centers on syndesmosis, talus, deltoid-ligament and related stabilizers.

claims.claimText: Students often underweight exam findings and over-rely on imaging when evaluating syndesmotic sprain.

metadata.claim_text: Students often underweight exam findings and over-rely on imaging when evaluating syndesmotic sprain.

claims.claimText: State mechanism, key exam findings, imaging role, treatment concept, and return-to-play framework for syndesmotic sprain.

metadata.claim_text: State mechanism, key exam findings, imaging role, treatment concept, and return-to-play framework for syndesmotic sprain.

claims.claimText: Do not anchor on a single exam maneuver for syndesmotic sprain — integrate mechanism, instability symptoms, and imaging pattern.

metadata.claim_text: Do not anchor on a single exam maneuver for syndesmotic sprain — integrate mechanism, instability symptoms, and imaging pattern.

claims.claimText: Syndesmotic sprains cause prolonged recovery when missed; external rotation and squeeze tests raise suspicion.

metadata.claim_text: Syndesmotic sprains cause prolonged recovery when missed; external rotation and squeeze tests raise suspicion.

claims.claimText: Rehabilitation milestones and return-to-play criteria for syndesmotic sprain require attending-defined progression gates.

metadata.claim_text: Rehabilitation milestones and return-to-play criteria for syndesmotic sprain require attending-defined progression gates.

claims.claimText: Weber B/C ankle fracture patterns and syndesmotic injury share instability language — evaluate mortise and syndesmosis integrity.

decisionPoints.trigger: Active athlete with functional instability or mechanical symptoms from syndesmotic sprain despite appropriate initial management
decisionPoints.action: Discuss operative reconstruction versus continued rehabilitation; graft selection and fixation are attending decisions

decisionPoints.trigger: Athlete approaching return-to-sport after syndesmotic sprain treatment
decisionPoints.action: Apply sport-specific return-to-play criteria with strength, stability, and functional testing milestones
